title: grove serve explore mode — exclusive tool surface + health-gated startup/shutdown
description: grove serve gains a mode: with mcp-llm config present (or explicit flag), tools/list returns exactly one tool: explore (mcp__grove__explore client-side). Startup health-probe failure exits with descriptive stderr and never surfaces the tool; mid-session provider connection error shuts the server down descriptively (typed error from T03). Default-mode serve byte-identical — existing tests/cli.rs MCP cases and smoke test pass unchanged. New integration case: explore mode + unreachable provider fails fast (deterministic negative-path test).
